chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5840 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.25883/2024 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection No.34. 3. For order on CMA No.25884/2024 (Exemption). 4. For order on CMA No.25885/2024 (Stay). 5. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 18th November 2024 Mr. Khalid Jawed Khan alongwith Mr. Muhammad Umar Akhund, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be complied with before the next date. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. At the very outset learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that since various other taxpayers have approached the Islamabad High Court in respect of the issue in hand, wherein some orders have already been passed. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Petition and submits that the Petitioner may be permitted to seek same remedy. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
